# RAG: Retrieval Augmented Generation

- [IBM, March 2026: Is RAG still needed?](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=UabBYexBD4k)
- [IBM, March 2026: What is OpenRAG?](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=qreMmsOY86A)
- [deeplearning.ai course: Chat with your data](https://www.deeplearning.ai/short-courses/langchain-chat-with-your-data/)
- [IBM, Marina Danilevsky (7 min)](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=T-D1OfcDW1M)
